name: MIMIC_OMOP
description: Load MIMIC data into OMOP CDM format

data.name: load_mimic_data
data.description: Load raw MIMIC-IV CSV files from the hosp and icu subfolders of /app/mimic_omop/mimic into a DuckDB staging database
data.python_code:
SqlDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external'
MIMICCreateSql = f'{SqlDir}/duckdb_create_mimic.sql'
mimic_dir = '/app/mimic_omop/mimic'

def initialize_id_sequence(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection) -> None:
    """Create the sequence used to assign staging row ids."""
    conn.execute('CREATE SEQUENCE IF NOT EXISTS main.id_sequence;')

def create_table(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, sql_file: str, schema_name: str = None) -> None:
    """Run a DDL file, substituting @schema_name when present."""
    with open(sql_file, 'r') as file:
        sql_qry = file.read()
        if "@schema_name" in sql_qry:
            sql_qry = sql_qry.replace('@schema_name', schema_name)
        conn.execute(sql_qry)

def make_table_name(file_path: str) -> tuple:
    """Map a MIMIC CSV path to ('mimiciv_<module>.<table>', '<module>')."""
    basename = os.path.basename(file_path)
    table_name = basename.split('.')[0]
    pathname = os.path.dirname(file_path)
    dirname = os.path.basename(pathname)
    return f"mimiciv_{dirname}.{table_name}", dirname

def config_duckdb(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, memory_limit: str = "", threads: int = 4) -> None:
    """Apply DuckDB tuning; memory_limit is skipped when unset ("" is the d2e default)."""
    if memory_limit:
        conn.execute(f"SET memory_limit='{memory_limit}'")
    conn.execute(f"SET threads={threads}")
    conn.execute("SET preserve_insertion_order=false")

def exec(myinput):
    """Load MIMIC-IV hosp/icu CSVs into DuckDB."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    if (flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','mimic_to_duckdb']) and load_mimic_vocab == "True":
        logger.info('Start loading mimic data')
        DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT = Variable.get("duckdb_memory_limit", default="")
        DUCKDB_THREADS = int(Variable.get("duckdb_threads", default="4"))
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            config_duckdb(conn, memory_limit=DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT, threads=DUCKDB_THREADS)
            # initialize_id_sequence
            initialize_id_sequence(conn)
            # create tables
            create_table(conn, MIMICCreateSql)
            # copy csv tables from the hosp and icu subfolders only
            csv_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(mimic_dir, "hosp", "*.csv*")) + glob.glob(os.path.join(mimic_dir, "icu", "*.csv*"))
            for file_path in csv_files:
                table_name, dir_name = make_table_name(file_path)
                try:
                    sql_qry = f"""COPY {table_name} FROM '{file_path}' (ESCAPE '\"', HEADER);"""
                    conn.execute(sql_qry)
                    logger.info(f"Loading {table_name} done")
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.error(f"Error loading {file_path}: {str(e)}")
                    raise Exception()
            return "Load mimic data successful"

data.name: load_vocab
data.description: Load OMOP vocabulary CSV files from /app/mimic_omop/vocab into the mimic_staging schema and generate MIMIC custom vocabularies
data.python_code:
SqlDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external'
CreateVocabTable = f'{SqlDir}/vocabulary-refresh/create_vocab_input_tables.sql'
CustomVocabDir = f'{SqlDir}/vocabulary-refresh/'
vocab_dir = '/app/mimic_omop/vocab'

def execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, dir_root: str, sql_files: list, log_messages: list) -> None:
    """Execute SQL files from dir_root in order, logging one message per file."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    try:
        for (sql_file, log_message) in zip(sql_files, log_messages, strict=True):
            logger.info(log_message)
            with open(os.path.join(dir_root, sql_file), 'r') as file:
                query = file.read()
                conn.execute(query)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error executing {sql_file}: {str(e)}")
        raise

def create_table(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, sql_file: str, schema_name: str = None) -> None:
    """Run a DDL file, substituting @schema_name when present."""
    with open(sql_file, 'r') as file:
        sql_qry = file.read()
        if "@schema_name" in sql_qry:
            sql_qry = sql_qry.replace('@schema_name', schema_name)
        conn.execute(sql_qry)

def create_schema(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, schema_name: str) -> None:
    """Drop the schema if it exists and recreate it empty."""
    conn.execute(f"""
    DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS {schema_name} CASCADE ;
    CREATE SCHEMA {schema_name} ;
    """)

def config_duckdb(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, memory_limit: str = "", threads: int = 4) -> None:
    """Apply DuckDB tuning; memory_limit is skipped when unset ("" is the d2e default)."""
    if memory_limit:
        conn.execute(f"SET memory_limit='{memory_limit}'")
    conn.execute(f"SET threads={threads}")
    conn.execute("SET preserve_insertion_order=false")

def exec(myinput):
    """Load OMOP vocabularies and build MIMIC custom vocabularies."""
    logger = get_run_logger()

    if (flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','mimic_to_duckdb']) and load_mimic_vocab == "True":
        logger.info('Start loading vocab')
        DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT = Variable.get("duckdb_memory_limit", default="")
        DUCKDB_THREADS = int(Variable.get("duckdb_threads", default="4"))
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            config_duckdb(conn, memory_limit=DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT, threads=DUCKDB_THREADS)
            create_schema(conn, 'mimic_staging')
            create_table(conn, CreateVocabTable)
            # insert vocab tables; only files with a matching staging table (skips e.g. CONCEPT_CPT4, CONCEPT_RECOMMENDED)
            staging_tables = {x[0] for x in conn.execute("SELECT table_name FROM duckdb_tables() WHERE schema_name = 'mimic_staging'").fetchall()}
            csv_files = glob.glob(os.path.join(vocab_dir, "**/*.csv*"), recursive=True)
            for file in csv_files:
                csv_name = os.path.basename(file).split('.')[0].lower()
                table_name = '_'.join(['mimic_staging.tmp', csv_name])
                if f'tmp_{csv_name}' not in staging_tables:
                    logger.warning(f"Skipping {os.path.basename(file)}: no staging table {table_name}")
                    continue
                try:
                    query = f"""
                    TRUNCATE TABLE {table_name};
                    COPY {table_name} FROM '{file}' (DATEFORMAT '%Y%m%d', DELIMITER '\t', FORMAT CSV, HEADER, QUOTE '"',ESCAPE '\"');
                    """
                    conn.execute(query)
                    logger.info(f"Loading {table_name.replace('mimic_staging.tmp_', '')} done")
                except Exception as e:
                    logger.error(f"Error loading {file}: {str(e)}")
                    raise Exception()
            # generate_custom_vocab
            CustomVocabSqls = ['create_voc_from_tmp.sql',
                'custom_mapping_load.sql',
                'custom_vocabularies.sql',
                'vocabulary_cleanup.sql']
            CustomVocabLogs = ['Building vocabularies from temporary staging tables',
                'Loading custom concept mappings',
                'Generating custom vocabularies',
                'Cleaning up temporary vocabulary tables']
            try:
                execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn, CustomVocabDir, CustomVocabSqls, CustomVocabLogs)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Error generating custom vocabularies: {str(e)}")
                raise Exception()

data.name: staging_mimic
data.description: Create the mimic_etl schema, stage MIMIC core/hosp/icu data and copy vocabularies, then drop the raw input schemas
data.python_code:
StagDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external/staging'

def execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, dir_root: str, sql_files: list, log_messages: list) -> None:
    """Execute SQL files from dir_root in order, logging one message per file."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    try:
        for (sql_file, log_message) in zip(sql_files, log_messages, strict=True):
            logger.info(log_message)
            with open(os.path.join(dir_root, sql_file), 'r') as file:
                query = file.read()
                conn.execute(query)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error executing {sql_file}: {str(e)}")
        raise

def create_schema(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, schema_name: str) -> None:
    """Drop the schema if it exists and recreate it empty."""
    conn.execute(f"""
    DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS {schema_name} CASCADE ;
    CREATE SCHEMA {schema_name} ;
    """)

def config_duckdb(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, memory_limit: str = "", threads: int = 4) -> None:
    """Apply DuckDB tuning; memory_limit is skipped when unset ("" is the d2e default)."""
    if memory_limit:
        conn.execute(f"SET memory_limit='{memory_limit}'")
    conn.execute(f"SET threads={threads}")
    conn.execute("SET preserve_insertion_order=false")

def staging_mimic_data(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, StagDir: str, StagSql: list, StagLogs: list) -> None:
    """Create the mimic_etl schema and run the staging SQL scripts."""
    create_schema(conn, 'mimic_etl')
    execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn, StagDir, StagSql, StagLogs)

def exec(myinput):
    """Stage MIMIC data into mimic_etl and drop the raw schemas."""

    StagSql = ['etl_OMOPCDM_postgresql_5.3_ddl_adapted_no_vocab.sql',
                'st_core.sql',
                'st_hosp.sql',
                'st_icu.sql',
                'voc_copy_to_target_dataset.sql']
    StagLogs = ['Creating OMOP CDM staging schema (DDL, no vocab)',
                'Staging MIMIC core tables',
                'Staging MIMIC hospital tables',
                'Staging MIMIC ICU tables',
                'Copying vocabularies to target dataset']

    if flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','mimic_to_duckdb'] and load_mimic_vocab == "True":
        DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT = Variable.get("duckdb_memory_limit", default="")
        DUCKDB_THREADS = int(Variable.get("duckdb_threads", default="4"))
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            config_duckdb(conn, memory_limit=DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT, threads=DUCKDB_THREADS)
            staging_mimic_data(conn, StagDir, StagSql, StagLogs)
            conn.execute("DROP SCHEMA mimiciv_hosp CASCADE")
            conn.execute("DROP SCHEMA mimiciv_icu CASCADE")
            conn.execute("DROP SCHEMA mimic_staging CASCADE")

data.name: etl_transformation
data.description: Run the 33 MIMIC-to-OMOP CDM 5.3 ETL transformation scripts (lookups, clinical tables, era tables, metadata)
data.python_code:
ETLDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external/etl'

def execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, dir_root: str, sql_files: list, log_messages: list) -> None:
    """Execute SQL files from dir_root in order, logging one message per file."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    try:
        for (sql_file, log_message) in zip(sql_files, log_messages, strict=True):
            logger.info(log_message)
            with open(os.path.join(dir_root, sql_file), 'r') as file:
                query = file.read()
                conn.execute(query)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error executing {sql_file}: {str(e)}")
        raise

def config_duckdb(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, memory_limit: str = "", threads: int = 4) -> None:
    """Apply DuckDB tuning; memory_limit is skipped when unset ("" is the d2e default)."""
    if memory_limit:
        conn.execute(f"SET memory_limit='{memory_limit}'")
    conn.execute(f"SET threads={threads}")
    conn.execute("SET preserve_insertion_order=false")

def exec(myinput):
    """Run the OMOP CDM ETL transformation scripts."""
    logger = get_run_logger()

    ETLSqls = ['cdm_location.sql',
                'cdm_care_site.sql',
                'cdm_person.sql',
                'cdm_death.sql',
                'lk_vis_part_1.sql',
                'lk_meas_unit.sql',
                # ULLIF(regexp_extract(),'') replace postgres(regexp_match)
                'lk_meas_chartevents.sql',
                'lk_meas_labevents.sql',
                'lk_meas_specimen.sql',
                'lk_meas_outputevents.sql',
                'lk_vis_part_2.sql',
                'cdm_visit_occurrence.sql',
                'cdm_visit_detail.sql',
                'lk_cond_diagnoses.sql',
                'lk_procedure.sql',
                'lk_observation.sql',
                'cdm_condition_occurrence.sql',
                'cdm_procedure_occurrence.sql',
                'cdm_specimen.sql',
                'cdm_measurement.sql',
                'lk_drug.sql',
                'cdm_drug_exposure.sql',
                'cdm_device_exposure.sql',
                'cdm_observation.sql',
                'cdm_observation_period.sql',
                'cdm_finalize_person.sql',
                'cdm_fact_relationship.sql',
                'cdm_condition_era.sql',
                'cdm_drug_era.sql',
                'cdm_dose_era.sql',
                'ext_d_itemid_to_concept.sql',
                'cdm_cdm_source.sql',
                'extra_cdm_tables.sql']
    ETLLogs = ['Populating CDM location table',
                'Populating CDM care site table',
                'Populating CDM person table',
                'Populating CDM death table',
                'Building visit lookup (part 1: admissions and transfers)',
                'Building measurement unit lookup',
                'Building chart events measurement lookup',
                'Building lab events measurement lookup',
                'Building specimen measurement lookup',
                'Building output events measurement lookup',
                'Building visit lookup (part 2: visit grouping)',
                'Populating CDM visit occurrence table',
                'Populating CDM visit detail table',
                'Building condition diagnosis lookup',
                'Building procedure lookup',
                'Building observation lookup',
                'Populating CDM condition occurrence table',
                'Populating CDM procedure occurrence table',
                'Populating CDM specimen table',
                'Populating CDM measurement table',
                'Building drug lookup',
                'Populating CDM drug exposure table',
                'Populating CDM device exposure table',
                'Populating CDM observation table',
                'Populating CDM observation period table',
                'Finalizing CDM person records',
                'Populating CDM fact relationship table',
                'Populating CDM condition era table',
                'Populating CDM drug era table',
                'Populating CDM dose era table',
                'Mapping item IDs to OMOP concepts',
                'Populating CDM source metadata table',
                'Populating extra CDM tables']

    if flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','mimic_to_duckdb']:
        DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT = Variable.get("duckdb_memory_limit", default="")
        DUCKDB_THREADS = int(Variable.get("duckdb_threads", default="4"))
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            config_duckdb(conn, memory_limit=DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT, threads=DUCKDB_THREADS)
            logger.info("*** Doing ETL transformations ***")
            try:
                execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn, ETLDir, ETLSqls, ETLLogs)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Error transforming mimic: {str(e)}")
                raise Exception()

data.name: cdm_table
data.description: Create the final cdm schema, unload the transformed data into OMOP CDM tables for ATLAS, then drop the mimic_etl schema
data.python_code:
CdmDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external/unload/'

def execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, dir_root: str, sql_files: list, log_messages: list) -> None:
    """Execute SQL files from dir_root in order, logging one message per file."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    try:
        for (sql_file, log_message) in zip(sql_files, log_messages, strict=True):
            logger.info(log_message)
            with open(os.path.join(dir_root, sql_file), 'r') as file:
                query = file.read()
                conn.execute(query)
    except Exception as e:
        logger.error(f"Error executing {sql_file}: {str(e)}")
        raise

def create_schema(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, schema_name: str) -> None:
    """Drop the schema if it exists and recreate it empty."""
    conn.execute(f"""
    DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS {schema_name} CASCADE ;
    CREATE SCHEMA {schema_name} ;
    """)

def config_duckdb(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, memory_limit: str = "", threads: int = 4) -> None:
    """Apply DuckDB tuning; memory_limit is skipped when unset ("" is the d2e default)."""
    if memory_limit:
        conn.execute(f"SET memory_limit='{memory_limit}'")
    conn.execute(f"SET threads={threads}")
    conn.execute("SET preserve_insertion_order=false")

def exec(myinput):
    """Build the final cdm schema and drop mimic_etl."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    CdmSqls = ['OMOPCDM_duckdb_5.3_ddl_adapted.sql', 'unload_to_atlas_gen.sql']
    CdmLogs = ['Creating final OMOP CDM DuckDB schema', 'Unloading CDM data for ATLAS']
    if flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','mimic_to_duckdb']:
        logger.info("*** Creating final CDM tables and copy data into them ***")
        DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT = Variable.get("duckdb_memory_limit", default="")
        DUCKDB_THREADS = int(Variable.get("duckdb_threads", default="4"))
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            config_duckdb(conn, memory_limit=DUCKDB_MEMORY_LIMIT, threads=DUCKDB_THREADS)
            try:
                create_schema(conn, 'cdm')
                execute_raw_sql_from_file(conn, CdmDir, CdmSqls, CdmLogs)
            except Exception as e:
                logger.error(f"Error creating final cdm data: {str(e)}")
                raise Exception()
        # Cleanup schemas
        with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
            conn.execute("DROP SCHEMA mimic_etl CASCADE")

data.name: duckdb_database
data.description: Export the cdm schema from the DuckDB file to the target database, via the trex pgwire passthrough (Postgres and HANA) or the legacy dialect-specific path
data.python_code:
CdmDir = 'flows/mimic_omop_conversion_plugin/external/unload/'
PostgresDDL = f'{CdmDir}export_postgresql_5.3_ddl_adapted.sql'
HANADDL = f'{CdmDir}export_hana_5.3_ddl_adapted.sql'

def create_table(conn: duckdb.DuckDBPyConnection, sql_file: str, schema_name: str = None) -> None:
    """Run a DDL file, substituting @schema_name when present."""
    with open(sql_file, 'r') as file:
        sql_qry = file.read()
        if "@schema_name" in sql_qry:
            sql_qry = sql_qry.replace('@schema_name', schema_name)
        conn.execute(sql_qry)

def export_data(duckdb_file_name: str, schema_name: str, to_dbdao, overwrite_schema: bool, chunk_size: int) -> None:
    """Legacy export: DuckDB ATTACH bulk insert for Postgres, SQLAlchemy chunked inserts for HANA."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    db_credentials = to_dbdao.tenant_configs
    dialect = to_dbdao.dialect
    if to_dbdao.check_schema_exists(schema_name):
        if overwrite_schema:
            to_dbdao.drop_schema(schema_name, cascade=True)
        else:
            logger.error(f"Schema '{schema_name}' exists! To overwrite the existing schema, set 'Overwrite Schema' to True")
            raise ValueError()
    to_dbdao.create_schema(schema_name)
    match dialect:
        case SupportedDatabaseDialects.POSTGRES:
            attach_qry = f"""ATTACH 'host={db_credentials.host} port={db_credentials.port} dbname={db_credentials.databaseName}
            user={db_credentials.adminUser} password={db_credentials.adminPassword.get_secret_value()}'
            AS pg (TYPE POSTGRES, SCHEMA {schema_name});
            """
            # Attach Posgres Database
            with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
                conn.execute(attach_qry)
                # Creat schema and tables in postgres database
                create_table(conn, PostgresDDL, schema_name=schema_name)
                tables = conn.execute(f"SELECT table_name FROM duckdb_tables() WHERE (database_name = 'pg')").fetchall()
                tables = [x[0] for x in tables]
                for table in tables:
                    logger.info(f"Inserting into {schema_name}.{table}")
                    conn.execute(f"""
                    INSERT INTO pg.{schema_name}.{table}
                    SELECT * FROM cdm.{table};
                    """)
                conn.execute("DETACH pg;")

        case SupportedDatabaseDialects.HANA:
            create_sqls = open(HANADDL).read().replace('@schema_name', schema_name).split(';')[:-1]
            for create_sql in create_sqls:
                with to_dbdao.engine.connect() as hana_conn:
                    hana_conn.execute(text(create_sql))
                    hana_conn.commit()
            tables = to_dbdao.get_table_names(schema=schema_name)
            for table in tables:
                logger.info(f"Inserting into {schema_name}.{table}")
                tmp = 0
                for chunk, percent in read_table_chunks(duckdb_file_name, table, chunk_size=chunk_size):
                    if percent != tmp:
                        flag = True
                        tmp = percent
                    else:
                        flag = False
                    if not chunk.empty:
                        insert_to_hana_direct(to_dbdao, chunk, schema_name, table)
                    if flag:
                        logger.info(f"{int(percent)}% of table '{table}' is inserted")
                logger.info(f"100% of table '{table}' is inserted")

def read_table_chunks(duckdb_file_name: str, table: str, chunk_size: int):
    """Yield (DataFrame chunk, percent complete) for a cdm table."""
    with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
        count = conn.execute(f"SELECT COUNT(*) FROM cdm.{table}").fetchone()[0]
        for offset in range(0, count, chunk_size):
            chunk = conn.execute(f"""
                SELECT * FROM cdm.{table}
                LIMIT {chunk_size} OFFSET {offset}
            """).df()
            percent = (offset/count * 100)//10 * 10
            yield chunk, percent

def insert_to_hana_direct(to_dbdao, chunk, schema_name: str, table: str) -> None:
    """Insert one DataFrame chunk into a HANA table via SQLAlchemy."""
    with to_dbdao.engine.connect() as hana_conn:
        # Use Upper case for HANA
        chunk.columns = chunk.columns.str.upper()
        # Replace np.nan with None
        chunk.replace([np.nan], [None], inplace=True)
        columns = chunk.columns.tolist()
        columns_str = ', '.join(f'"{col}"' for col in columns)
        placeholders = ','.join(f':{col}' for col in columns)
        insert_stmt = f'INSERT INTO {schema_name}.{table} ({columns_str}) VALUES ({placeholders})'
        data = chunk.to_dict('records')
        hana_conn.execute(text(insert_stmt), data)
        hana_conn.commit()
    to_dbdao.engine.dispose()

def export_data_trex(duckdb_file_name: str, schema_name: str, to_dbdao, overwrite_schema: bool, chunk_size: int, is_hana: bool) -> None:
    """Export the cdm schema through the trex pgwire passthrough (Postgres and HANA targets)."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    if to_dbdao.check_schema_exists(schema_name):
        if overwrite_schema:
            to_dbdao.drop_schema(schema_name, cascade=True)
        else:
            logger.error(f"Schema '{schema_name}' exists! To overwrite the existing schema, set 'Overwrite Schema' to True")
            raise ValueError()
    to_dbdao.create_schema(schema_name)
    database_ddl = HANADDL if is_hana else PostgresDDL
    # the postgres DDL targets the 'pg.' catalog alias of the legacy duckdb ATTACH
    # path; strip it since trex statements run directly on the target database
    create_sqls = open(database_ddl).read().replace('pg.@schema_name', '@schema_name').replace('@schema_name', schema_name).split(';')[:-1]
    for create_sql in create_sqls:
        to_dbdao.execute_sql(create_sql)
    with duckdb.connect(duckdb_file_name) as conn:
        tables = [x[0] for x in conn.execute("SELECT table_name FROM duckdb_tables() WHERE schema_name = 'cdm'").fetchall()]
    for table in tables:
        target_table = table.upper() if is_hana else table
        logger.info(f"Inserting into {schema_name}.{target_table}")
        tmp = 0
        for chunk, percent in read_table_chunks(duckdb_file_name, table, chunk_size=chunk_size):
            if percent != tmp:
                flag = True
                tmp = percent
            else:
                flag = False
            if not chunk.empty:
                # object dtype + where() nulls both NaN and NaT before pgwire insert
                chunk = chunk.astype(object).where(chunk.notna(), None)
                columns = [c.upper() for c in chunk.columns] if is_hana else list(chunk.columns)
                values = list(chunk.itertuples(index=False, name=None))
                to_dbdao.batch_insert_values(schema_name, target_table, columns, values)
            if flag:
                logger.info(f"{int(percent)}% of table '{table}' is inserted")
        logger.info(f"100% of table '{table}' is inserted")

def exec(myinput):
    """Export the cdm schema to the target database."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    if flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database','duckdb_to_database']:
        logger.info("<--------- Exporting CDM tables to Database --------->")
        if eval(use_trex_connection):
            # trex pgwire passthrough serves both Postgres and HANA targets; the dao
            # reports dialect 'trex', so probe the real dialect separately
            is_hana = DBDao(dialect=None, database_code=database_code).dialect == SupportedDatabaseDialects.HANA
            to_dbdao = DBDao(dialect=SupportedDatabaseDialects.TREX, database_code=database_code)
            to_dbdao.is_hana = is_hana
            export_data_trex(duckdb_file_name=duckdb_file_name, schema_name=schema_name, to_dbdao=to_dbdao, overwrite_schema=eval(overwrite_schema), chunk_size=int(chunk_size), is_hana=is_hana)
        else:
            # admin-portal ETL runs have no dataset id, so no cache_id: the dataset
            # PA/CDM config session variables only apply to registered datasets
            to_dbdao = DBDao(database_code=database_code)
            export_data(duckdb_file_name=duckdb_file_name, schema_name=schema_name, to_dbdao=to_dbdao, overwrite_schema=eval(overwrite_schema), chunk_size=int(chunk_size))

data.name: cleanup
data.description: Delete the intermediate DuckDB file after a successful export (mimic_to_database mode only)
data.python_code:
def exec(myinput):
    """Delete the intermediate DuckDB file."""
    logger = get_run_logger()
    if flow_action_type in ['mimic_to_database']:
        logger.info("<--------- Cleaning up DuckDB file --------->")
        os.remove(duckdb_file_name)
        logger.info(f"File '{duckdb_file_name}' deleted successfully.")
        logger.info("<--------- Workflow complete --------->")
